name: expo-go-skill
description: Skills for starting demo/MVP React Native mobile apps with Expo Go, Firebase auth, and Firestore.

plugins.name: expo-go
plugins.description: Build, run, and share React Native apps through Expo Go: scaffolding, expo-router, Firebase, notifications, on-device runs, and EAS Update sharing. Plus post-MVP native features (push/FCM, maps, location).
